facebook.caption:
4.4 stars. 69 reviews. And most tourists in Phu Quoc have never heard of Jerry's Jungle Tours.

Cửa Lấp, Phú Quốc is where the island stops looking like a postcard and starts looking real. Mangroves, waterways, the parts tour buses can never reach.

Small group. Local knowledge. Zero resort-lobby polish.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Boat cutting through the mangroves at Cửa Lấp, Phú Quốc. No crowds. No script. Just Jerry's Jungle Tours doing what the big operators won't. This is the side of the island most visitors fly home without seeing.
